nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 云雾森林
nodes.summary: 云雾森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Black guan、Red-faced guan、紫冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Cloud-forest pygmy owl
nodes.summary: Cloud-forest pygmy owl（Cloud-forest pygmy owl，学名 Glaucidium nubicola），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于云雾森林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This potential distribution comprises roughly 2570 km2. This pygmy owl inhabits primary or slightly altered cloud forests in mountainous regions of high rainfall and steep slopes

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The species is currently classified as vulnerable globally because it is suspected to be undergoing a rapid population decline within its naturally small distribution range, owing to severe ongoing deforestation. In addition, its probable distributional range is well below 5000 km2, and the population size is preliminarily estimated between only 2500 and 9999 individuals, of which 1500-7000 are mature individuals. It has lost 57% of its global range and 33% of its range in Ecuador
